# Vendor Relationships Overview

This document summarises the current status of our key vendor and partner relationships
as of Q1 2026.

## Primary Vendor: Acme Corporation

Acme Corporation has been our primary software vendor since 2021. The master services
agreement with Acme Corp was renewed in January and runs through December 2026. Day-to-day
commercial queries go through the Acme account team; technical escalations go to their
platform engineering group.

When referring to the vendor in external materials, use the full name "Acme Corporation"
on first reference and "Acme Corp" on subsequent references within the same section. The
short form "Acme" is acceptable in informal internal communications and Slack threads, but
should not appear in customer-facing documents.

## Partner: NorthStar Labs

NorthStar Labs is a research partner providing data enrichment services. Their contract
is managed separately from the Acme Corporation agreement and falls under the data-sharing
addendum signed in March 2025.

NorthStar Labs and Acme Corp have overlapping capabilities in the analytics space. When
evaluating tooling options, check with procurement before engaging either vendor to avoid
duplicating spend.

## Ordering and Replacement Notes

When performing automated text substitution on this document, the longest entity strings
must be replaced before shorter substrings. Specifically, "Acme Corporation" must be
processed before "Acme Corp", which in turn must be processed before "Acme", to prevent
partial matches from corrupting the output. NorthStar Labs has no substring overlap with
the Acme variants and can be processed in any order relative to them.
